content.content:
1	server:
2	  port: ${SERVER_PORT:8080}
3	
4	spring:
5	  profiles:
6	    active: ${SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE:dev}
7	  servlet:
8	    multipart:
9	      max-file-size: 5MB
10	      max-request-size: 5MB
11	  jackson:
12	    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss
13	    time-zone: Asia/Shanghai
14	
15	mybatis-plus:
16	  mapper-locations: classpath:mapper/*.xml
17	  configuration:
18	    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true
19	  global-config:
20	    db-config:
21	      id-type: auto
22	      logic-delete-field: deleted
23	      logic-delete-value: 1
24	      logic-not-delete-value: 0
25	
26	jwt:
27	  expiration: ${JWT_EXPIRATION:86400000}
28	
29	file:
30	  upload-dir: ${UPLOAD_DIR:./uploads}
31	
32	logging:
33	  level:
34	    com.coding.assistant: ${APP_LOG_LEVEL:info}
35
